name: community-roles-v1
description: Canonical community-role vocabulary used by `dev.idiolect.community#roleAssignment.role`. The default role is `member`; specific roles such as `moderator`, `delegate`, `author` are subsumed by `member`. Role-bearing operations (e.g., publishing on behalf of the community) typically check subsumption rather than equality.

nodes.label: Moderator
nodes.description: Authorized to apply the community's moderation policies.

nodes.label: Delegate
nodes.description: Authorized to act on the community's behalf in a defined scope.

nodes.label: Author
nodes.description: Recognized contributor of records owned by the community.
